title: NUPTIO Set of 2 Clear Glass Pillar Candle Holders, Wedding Centerpieces Candlestick Holders for 80mm Candles & Taper Candles Ideal Decoration for Weddings Events Parties, Christmas Candle Holder
features: PACKAGE INCLUDES: 2× 14cm(5.5") height centerpieces pillar & taper candle holder. Great centerpiece ornaments for wedding, birthday, candlelight dinner, dining room, living room, parlor, study and bar.
DUAL USES: Ideal for pillar or tealight candles that are less than 7.5cm diameter, also there is a indented center working for taper candle holder
DESIGN: You will find a slight lip around for potential wax spillage. Beautiful and simple, crafted by superior quality glass, very clear.
GREAT GIFT: It is an elegant and novel gift for graduations, birthdays, anniversary, wedding and special occasions to your friends and relatives.
ELEGANT DECOR: The crystal glass candlesticks complements any decor with a touch of sophistication. Plain candles will appear elegant in these candle holders.
